description: Hero-demo manifest — the looping landing showcase for mobile-mvp.html ONLY. Kept SEPARATE from data/sample-trips/index.json (which contract tests pin at exactly 50 trips). These are believable multi-modal personal journeys authored to glide slowly under the hero copy; the Browse sheet still uses the sample-trips catalog. Each trip is data/demo-trips/<era>/<id>.json with the same rich schema, minus the intro card.
